expectations: Phase 0 context loading is performed or acknowledged before investigation begins
Phase 1 dispatches at least 2 parallel investigation subagents (Error Analysis and Change Analysis at minimum)
Orchestrator provides a status update between dispatches including current phase and what is being investigated
A synthesis report is produced consolidating Phase 1 findings before hypothesis formation
Phase 3 hypothesis specifically identifies string interpolation in SQL as the root cause — not just 'SQL error' or 'special characters'
Phase 3.5 red-teams the hypothesis before implementation proceeds
Phase 4 implementer writes a failing test BEFORE implementing the fix
The fix uses parameterized queries or prepared statements — not string escaping as a band-aid
Phase 5 quality gate (red-team and/or code review) is performed on the fix
Orchestrator narrates each phase transition with hypothesis status and cycle count
The fix addresses the root cause (SQL injection vulnerability) not just the symptom (500 error on special characters)
